calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Enoch Wang, Esq. 415-837-3101 Fife Lawp LLP for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Joshua Cliffe, Esq. 415-433-1940 Littler Mendelson for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Both sides present arguments. The Court comment and poses questions. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SEMIANALYSIS LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings.
is Taken Under Submission

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
